description.en: Anthropic vendor binding on the text channel. Defaults: reasoningвҶ’opus, draftвҶ’sonnet, summarizeвҶ’haiku. Actual HTTP lives in server/src/bus/channels/text.ts; this plugin only declares capability list + roleвҶ’model mapping.
